app_description: FastAPI backend + pydantic-ai agent. React frontend (Vite). Plain chat UI — messages in, AI responses out. No feedback buttons at all. Session ID generated server-side, returned in X-Session-ID response header, stored in React state. Deployed on Vercel (frontend) + Fly.io (backend).

assertions.description: agentic_session() wraps agent call with session_id
KeletProvider added at React root with publishable key
VoteFeedback component added next to AI message output (not a floating widget or separate page)
Session ID from X-Session-ID response header is captured in React state and passed to VoteFeedback sessionId prop
Both KELET_API_KEY and VITE_KELET_PUBLISHABLE_KEY are present in .env at end of integration (either pre-existing or newly added). Neither hardcoded in source.
VoteFeedback is placed and configured to look natural in the chat UI — not a jarring out-of-place widget. Skill checks existing styles/theme and passes appropriate props or classnames.

Skill identifies at least one additional implicit frontend signal beyond VoteFeedback — e.g. useKeletSignal for copy-to-clipboard on AI output, message retry, or session abandon. Does not just stop at VoteFeedback.
Synthetic evaluator deeplink generated via Bash (not shown as code block)
